circuit_timings.name: ZkPkBfv

circuit_timings.name: ZkShareComputation
circuit_timings.comparability_note: PVTHFHE measures full keygen simulator (Round1+Round2+Round3); Interfold ZkShareComputation is the share-computation step in isolation. Reader-side adjustment may be needed.

circuit_timings.name: ZkShareEncryption
